scripts.cms:bootstrap: npm run cms:install && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('cms/.env')) fs.copyFileSync('cms/.env.example','cms/.env')" && npm --prefix cms run seed
scripts.cms:dev: npm run cms:install && npm --prefix cms run dev
scripts.cms:build: npm run cms:install && npm --prefix cms run build
scripts.cms:seed: npm run cms:install && npm --prefix cms run seed
scripts.cms:create-admin: npm run cms:install && npm --prefix cms run create-admin
